title: Claude Launcher Plus — Providers Configuration
description: Schema for ~/.claude/providers.json. Supports v1 (plaintext keys) and v2 ($VAR env references).

version.description: Schema version. Omit for v1 (plaintext keys). Set to 2 for $VAR env-var references.

providers.description: Map of provider name → provider configuration.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in status display.

env.description: Environment variables to set for this provider. In v2, string values starting with $ are resolved from the shell environment (e.g. "$DEEPSEEK_API_KEY").

models.description: Optional list of models. If present, user picks one after selecting the provider. Model-level env is merged on top of provider-level env.

name.description: Display name shown in the model picker.

env.description: Model-specific env vars merged on top of provider-level env. Typically sets ANTHROPIC_MODEL.
